title: Add Sera Ai News to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Breaking news from the hive
gist.blurb: Sera AI News just landed in the greenhouse! This clever Telegram bot uses Pollinations to generate fresh images for daily news items.
gist.summary: Added Sera AI News, a Telegram bot that generates images for news items, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with Sera AI News in our community app directory.
gist.visual_concept: News and broadcasting theme. Polly the bee acting as a retro journalist or newsie, interacting with a Telegram-style paper airplane or a newspaper. The robot companion displaying news on its screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny 1920s reporter hat with a 'PRESS' card tucked in the band, reading a freshly printed pixelated newspaper. A chunky retro robot companion with a CRT monitor head displays a glowing paper airplane icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny 1920s reporter hat with a 'PRESS' card tucked in the band, reading a freshly printed pixelated newspaper. A chunky retro robot companion with a CRT monitor head displays a glowing paper airplane icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background.
